title: freziera guatemalensis
intro: Freziera guatemalensis, also known as Guatemalan Freziera, is a plant species in the family Theaceae, native to Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Freziera guatemalensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Freziera guatemalensis can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
